CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {} (
        fact_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        os_ver_id TEXT,
        fact_time DATETIME NOT NULL,
        fact_flags INTEGER,
        fact_type INTEGER,
        fact_source INTEGER,
        fact_name TEXT,
        metric_key TEXT,
        metric_type INTEGER,
        metric_name TEXT,
        metric_mask INTEGER,
        metric_time DATETIME,
        metric_hash INTEGER,
        metric_hist BLOB,
        metric_count INTEGER,
        metric_min REAL

SELECT
      json_extract(metric_hist, '$') AS metric_hist,
      metric_count,
      metric_min,
      metric_max,
      metric_sum,
      metric_sos,
      metric_latest,
      json_extract(metric_tags, '$') AS metric_tags,
      time_mask_day,
      time_mask_hour,
      time_mask_minute

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS uqi_model (
                    model_id INTEGER,
                    model_version TEXT NOT NULL,
                    model_name TEXT NOT NULL,
                    model BLOB NOT NULL,
                    timestamp DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                    PRIMARY KEY(model_id, model_version));

CREATE TABLE "ServiceUsageHistory"(
                    "Kind" TEXT NOT NULL,
                    "Timestamp" DATETIME NOT NULL,
                    PRIMARY KEY(Kind, Timestamp));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS uqi_os_info (
                    os_ver_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    os_sku TEXT,
                    os_build TEXT,
                    os_ver_binary TEXT,
                    os_ver_major TEXT,
                    os_ver_minor TEXT,
                    os_ver_build TEXT,
                    os_ver_branch TEXT,
                    os_build_type TEXT,
                    os_build_date TEXT,
                    os_release TEXT,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS uqi_device_info (
                    device_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    device_class TEXT,
                    device_make TEXT,
                    device_model TEXT,
                    device_isMsft INTEGER,
                    device_isTest INTEGER,
                    device_isVirtual INTEGER,
                    device_isCopilot INTEGER,
                    obs_numberline INTEGER);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS uqi_model_fact_join (
                model_id INTEGER,
                model_version TEXT NOT NULL,
                fact_row_id INTEGER,
                fact_date DATE,
                is_1p INTEGER,
                PRIMARY KEY(model_id, model_version, fact_row_id, fact_date, is_1p));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS exp_id (
                hash INTEGER,
                exp_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                Timestamp DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY(hash));
